# Odysseus AI

> A self-hosted local-first orchestration client cockpit for managing local LLMs, hardware requirements, and multi-agent crews securely.

## Key Resources

- [Home Page](https://odysseusai.ai/) - PewDiePie's Odysseus AI local installation and configuration hub.
- [Marketplace](https://odysseusai.ai/products) - Hardware and software products optimized for Odysseus AI workflows.
- [Infrastructure & Cost Calculator](https://odysseusai.ai/calculator) - Calculate AI API costs and VRAM requirement breakdown for local LLM models.
- [Workspace Simulator](https://odysseusai.ai/workspace-simulator) - Interactive local model simulator and parameter tuning cockpit.
- [Guides & Resources](https://odysseusai.ai/resources) - Technical tutorials, configuration manuals, and setup resources.
- [Triage Wizard](https://odysseusai.ai/triage-wizard) - Diagnose local AI setup issues and parse container logs.
- [Launch Kit](https://odysseusai.ai/launch-kit) - Odysseus AI complete local-first setup workbook and diagnostic checklist.
- [LLM Directory](https://odysseusai.ai/llm-directory) - Comprehensive catalog of local-first LLMs, parameter counts, and VRAM requirements.
- [Workloads Framework](https://odysseusai.ai/workloads) - Multi-agent crew task orchestrator and prompt compiler.
- [Install Hub](https://odysseusai.ai/odysseus-ai-install) - Central guide directory for deploying Odysseus AI on Windows, Mac, and Linux.
- [Docker Setup Guide](https://odysseusai.ai/install/docker) - Deploy Odysseus AI locally in containerized environments using Docker Compose.
- [Ollama Setup Guide](https://odysseusai.ai/install/ollama) - Configure local model serving acceleration endpoints with Ollama.
- [Windows Installation Guide](https://odysseusai.ai/install/windows) - Native Windows installation walkthrough with NVIDIA CUDA acceleration.
- [macOS Installation Guide](https://odysseusai.ai/install/macbook) - Native macOS installation instructions with Metal API acceleration.
- [Error Doctor](https://odysseusai.ai/fix) - Diagnose and fix common terminal, CUDA context, and container issues.
- [About Us](https://odysseusai.ai/about) - Our open-source local-first vision, background, and credentials.
- [Contact Us](https://odysseusai.ai/contact) - Get in touch with support, community channels, and business inquiries.
- [Privacy Policy](https://odysseusai.ai/privacy) - Our strict local-first zero data tracking privacy policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://odysseusai.ai/terms) - Terms and conditions for utilizing the Odysseus AI companion tools.
- [Blog Directory](https://odysseusai.ai/blog) - Latest technical guides and articles regarding local LLM setups.
- [Auth Cockpit](https://odysseusai.ai/login) - User login and registration cockpit workspace.
- [Guide: Odysseus AI Local Install Tutorial: The Definitive Step-by-Step Guide](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-ai-local-install-tutorial) - Learn how to deploy Odysseus AI locally on Windows, macOS, and Linux without encountering common terminal errors. Target keywords: local AI install, run Odysseus locally, deploy open-source LLM.
- [Guide: How to Run DeepSeek Coder Locally via Ollama Integration](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/run-deepseek-coder-locally-ollama) - Unlock coding autonomy by running DeepSeek Coder locally. We explain setup command, model pulling, and integration with Odysseus workspace. Target keywords: DeepSeek Ollama, local coding LLM, offline programmer.
- [Guide: Resolving CUDA Out of Memory (OOM) Errors in Local LLMs](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/resolve-cuda-out-of-memory-local-llm) - A complete guide to resolving CUDA Out of Memory errors on Windows and Linux when serving open-source models. Target keywords: CUDA OOM error, GPU memory optimization, run LLM low VRAM.
- [Guide: Best GPUs for Running LLMs at Home: 2026 Buyer's Guide](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/best-gpus-for-running-llms-at-home) - Looking for the ultimate GPU setup for running offline AI? Compare VRAM bandwidth, memory size, and cost across NVIDIA and Apple Silicon. Target keywords: best GPU for LLM, run AI at home, VRAM comparison.
- [Guide: Docker Compose Ollama GPU Pass-Through Configuration Tutorial](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/docker-compose-ollama-gpu-pass-through) - Step-by-step instructions to configure GPU acceleration inside Docker containers for Ollama workflows. Target keywords: Docker GPU pass-through, nvidia docker compose, containerized ollama accelerator.
- [Guide: How to Build an AI Agent Crew with Odysseus Framework](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/how-to-build-ai-agent-crew-odysseus) - Discover the power of multi-agent architectures. Create researchers, writers, and debugging specialists that collaborate autonomously. Target keywords: AI agent crew, multi-agent framework, Odysseus RAG.
- [Guide: PocketBase Local AI User Management Configuration Guide](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/pocketbase-local-ai-user-management) - Learn how PocketBase integrates with Odysseus frontend for secure user auth, session caching, and database logs. Target keywords: PocketBase AI auth, local DB user admin, SQLite encryption.
- [Guide: Quantization Levels Explained: Q4_K_M vs Q8_0 GGUF Models](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/quantization-levels-explained-gguf) - Confused by quantization tags? Learn the difference in performance, memory size, and perplexity for local GGUF models. Target keywords: GGUF quantization levels, Q4_K_M vs Q8_0, LLM perplexity.
- [Guide: Offline RAG Pipeline with High-Speed GGUF Embeddings](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/offline-rag-pipeline-gguf-embeddings) - Build a secure local document retrieval pipeline using vector DBs and local embeddings. Target keywords: offline RAG tutorial, local embedding model, GGUF retrieval generator.
- [Guide: Setting Up Custom LLM System Prompts for Coding Agents](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/setting-up-custom-llm-system-prompts) - Instruct your coding assistants to write clean, maintainable code without excessive commentary. Target keywords: system prompt engineering, custom coding agent instructions, LLM template.
- [Guide: What is Odysseus AI? The Self-Hosted Workspace Explained](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/what-is-odysseus-ai) - An in-depth look at PewDiePie's open-source Odysseus AI local workspace and what it solves. Learn about local-first design models.
- [Guide: How to Run Odysseus AI: Native Script & Docker Methods](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/how-to-run-odysseus) - Get copyable commands and workflows to run Odysseus AI on Windows, Mac, and Linux systems. Choose the best route for your hardware.
- [Guide: Odysseus Setup: Customizing Ports, .env and SQLite DBs](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-setup) - Customize the Odysseus workspace port settings, environment overrides, and Pocketbase database connections to fit your layout.
- [Guide: Odysseus AI Workspace Tutorial: First-Run Walkthrough](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-tutorial) - Step-by-step tutorial navigating settings, chat views, vector search indexes, and agents on first launch.
- [Guide: Odysseus AI Ollama Models: VRAM and Parameter Guides](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-ai-ollama-models) - Which local model weights work best with your graphics card VRAM? We list the top GGUF downloads for offline use.
- [Guide: How to Verify the Official Odysseus AI GitHub Repository](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-ai-github) - Always download from the official owner. We show you how to clone and audit the repo safely.
- [Guide: Odysseus AI Download Guide: Avoid Malware & Mirrors](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-ai-download) - Avoid compiled installers and suspicious mirrors. Learn how to compile directly from source code safely.
- [Guide: Odysseus AI vs ChatGPT: Local Privacy vs Hosted APIs](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-ai-vs-chatgpt) - Compare offline loopbacks with cloud endpoints. Why PewDiePie built a local-first interface.
- [Guide: Odysseus AI vs Hermes vs OpenClaw: Architecture Differences](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-ai-vs-hermes-vs-openclaw) - A comparison of self-hosted UI layouts, database bindings, and agent loop schedulers.
- [Guide: Odysseus AI vs Claude: Offline Sandbox vs Web Endpoints](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-ai-vs-claude) - Is local inference ready to replace Anthropic Claude for coding? We compare capabilities.
- [Guide: Odysseus AI vs Open WebUI: UI Resource Footprints Compared](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/odysseus-ai-vs-open-webui) - We compare memory overhead, RAG ingestion speed, and container counts for local setups.
- [Guide: PewDiePie Odysseus AI: The Story Behind the Project](https://odysseusai.ai/guides/pewdiepie-odysseus-ai) - How PewDiePie's local-first AI client became a popular tool for self-hosted LLM setups.
